response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with over 6 years in full-stack roles, including leadership positions. Her background aligns well with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java/Python). She has contributed to high-scale systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and enterprise automation, showing both technical depth and architectural awareness. While her resume lacks explicit mention of Vitest, her testing expertise (Jest, Playwright) and emphasis on test-driven development suggest adaptability.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements
Proven track record in scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of requests/sec) and AI-agent development
Demonstrated leadership in architecture decisions, testing practices (TDD, CI/CD), and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: No explicit mention of Vitest experience, though testing frameworks (Jest/Playwright) are well-covered
Primary resume highlights DLang and Ember.js, which are not part of the required stack—though adaptability is evident
Limited detail on cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) and Kubernetes experience in recent roles

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and modern development practices
